## Issue Type

- [ ] Outright malicious (data exfiltration, unauthorized access, etc.)
- [ ] Security vulnerability (injection, overly broad permissions, etc.)
- [ ] Suspicious update (previously safe skill suddenly changed)
- [ ] Misleading description (claims to do X, actually does Y)
- [ ] Other: ___

---

## What You Observed

Describe what the skill does that seems wrong. Be specific:

- What file did you read? (paste the relevant section of SKILL.md if applicable)
- What network calls did you see it make?
- What files did it access or modify?
- What changed in your memory files or state files after using it?
